name: §6Mooshroom Cow
description:
§8Farming Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Farming Fortune: §a[Farming Fortune]

§6Efficient Mushrooms
§7Mushroom and Mycelium minions work
§a30% §7faster while on your island.

§6Mushroom Eater
§7When breaking mature crops, there
§7is a §a100% §7chance that a mushroom will
§7drop.

§6Farming Strength
§7Gain §6+0.7☘ Farming Fortune §7per
§7every §c20 ❁ Strength§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Lunar Ox Mooshroom Cow Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7§7This skin can only be applied to
§7Mooshroom Cow pets.

§7§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
